description: An online quiz is supposed to be available in the LMS, but a student reports they cannot see or access it.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student, course, and quiz.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the context of the problem.

nodes.task_description: Check the quiz settings in the LMS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent discovers the professor set the wrong release date, and the quiz is not yet visible to students.

nodes.task_description: Contact the professor to inform them of the settings error so they can correct it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an email to the professor explaining the issue.
